landing.headline: Create Cinematic Videos in Seconds
landing.subtitle: AI-powered browser editing with premium motion tools and smooth cinematic workflows.
landing.testimonial: Trusted by creative studios, indie filmmakers, and ambitious storytellers.
landing.testimonialQuote1: "JWE transformed our editing workflow with fast previews and expressive motion."
landing.testimonialQuote2: "The interface feels polished, cinematic, and instantly familiar."
landing.aiToolsTitle: AI tools for every stage of your edit
landing.aiToolsSubtitle: Build fast and refined videos with scene-aware automation, audio polishing, and cinematic finishing touches.
landing.showcaseCopy: A future-ready editing experience with glassmorphism panels, cinematic micro-interactions, and polished UI motion.
landing.workflowTitle: Everything you need for cinematic publishing
landing.workflowCopy: From creative motion edits to export-ready video, Jokky White Editing brings premium tooling to the browser.
landing.editorSuiteCopy: Timeline, text overlay, audio mix, transitions, filters.
landing.exportWorkflowCopy: 720p, 1080p and 4K quality options powered by FFmpeg architecture.
landing.trustedCopy: Fast clip trimming, smooth repositioning, and refined storyboarding.
landing.cloudCopy: Save progress locally, access advanced cloud sync ideas for future releases.

editor.exportCopy: Export MP4 with next-gen browser rendering architecture. The experience is built for cinematic quality, fast previews, and real output pipelines.
editor.selectedClipCopy: Configure text overlays, filters, and audio for the current selection.

dashboard.workspaceCopy: Launch your next cinematic edit from a dashboard that feels sleek, calm, and built for creative velocity.
dashboard.aiWorkflowCopy: Modern AI support for premium storytelling.

pricing.headline: Plans built for cinematic production.
pricing.description: Choose a plan that fits freelance creators, content studios, and enterprise teams that need premium video editing tools in the browser.

auth.createAccountCopy: Create your Jokky White Editing account to save projects and access AI tools.
auth.signinCopy: Sign in to continue editing stunning cinematic videos in the browser.

projects.description: Continue where you left off and keep every cinematic cut polished for future exports.

export.title: Export Your Masterpiece
export.description: Select export quality and preview your final render settings before download.
export.statusDescription: Your video will export to a polished MP4 preview with premium color profiles and motion-safe playback.

footer.description: Cinema-grade editing tools in the browser.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Jokky White Editing. All rights reserved.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The cinematic canvas you requested does not exist. Navigate back to the editor and continue creating.
